backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing video clip management, YouTube channel OAuth connection, clip posting to YouTube, and trending clip analytics with role-based access control using MixinAuthorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that preserves videoClips and userProfiles maps during canister upgrades by copying data from old actor state to new actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features for debugging and fixing the YouTube OAuth connection flow in ChannelConnection component, useYouTubeChannel hook, and adding comprehensive error logging.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components including App, Layout, video player, clip management UI, hooks for YouTube validation, clip creation, trending clips, admin functionality, and styling configuration.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with custom OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light and dark themes including primary, secondary, muted, destructive, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, page title 'Beast Clipping', root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application with routing, authentication flow, profile setup, video URL submission, YouTube player, clip creation controls, clip list, AI suggestions, channel connection, and admin panel with loading states.
Admin debug panel component displaying authentication status, admin principals, hashmap size, initialization status with copy-to-clipboard functionality, character-by-character string comparison, and refresh capability.
frontend/src/components/AdminErrorBounda: React error boundary component that catches and displays errors in the admin panel with detailed error messages, stack traces, and recovery options.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: Main admin dashboard component displaying statistics (total clips, trending analytics), with a collapsible debug panel and error handling with retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/ChannelConnectio: Component for connecting/disconnecting YouTube channels, displaying connection status with avatar, channel name, and action buttons with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/components/ClipCard.tsx: Card component displaying individual video clip with thumbnail, title, duration, viral score badge, delete functionality, and YouTube posting capability with connection status checks.
frontend/src/components/ClipList.tsx: Scrollable list component that displays all saved video clips using ClipCard components, with loading states and empty state messaging.
Component that displays either AI-generated clip suggestions or trending viral clips with scores, timestamps, and quick-use buttons for selecting suggested clips.
frontend/src/components/ClipTimestampCon: React component for creating video clips with timestamp controls (start/end times) and title input, supporting both manual entry and auto-populated suggestions from selected clips or AI-generated suggestions.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout component with header navigation, authentication controls (Internet Identity login/logout), and conditional admin panel button visibility based on user ownership status with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Profile setup form component that collects user name and email on first login, storing them in a combined format until backend UserProfile type is updated.
frontend/src/components/VideoUrlForm.tsx: Form component for entering YouTube URLs with validation, video ID extraction, and an AI clip generation button that triggers auto-generation of clip suggestions.
Badge component displaying viral potential scores (0-100%) with color-coded styling and icons (Flame/TrendingUp/Sparkles) based on score thresholds.
frontend/src/components/YouTubePlayer.ts: Simple YouTube iframe embed component that displays a video player given a video ID in a responsive 16:9 aspect ratio card.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, initializing access control and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminDebug.ts: Hook for fetching admin debug information including current principal, admin status, and admin principals list (backend method pending implementation).
Empty file placeholder for admin password authentication functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminStats.ts: Hook for fetching admin statistics including total clips count and trending clips analytics using React Query with the backend actor.
Provides a mutation hook to auto-generate clip suggestions for a video, currently using mock AI data with viral scores, with plans to integrate real AI services through the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipCreation.ts: Mutation hook for creating video clips that calculates a viral score based on duration and title characteristics, then saves the clip via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useClips.ts: Query and mutation hooks for fetching all clips and deleting individual clips, with loading state management.
frontend/src/hooks/useClipTimestamps.ts: Manages clip timestamp state (start/end minutes/seconds), provides validation, formatting, and conversion utilities for time ranges.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity state, and AuthClient configuration with delegation handling.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsOwner.ts: Query hook that checks if the current user is an admin by calling the backend's isCallerAdmin method, with extensive debug logging.
frontend/src/hooks/usePostToYouTube.ts: Mutation hook for posting a clip to YouTube via the backend actor, handling success/error states and invalidating clip queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides query and mutation hooks for fetching and saving the current user's profile, with query invalidation on profile updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useTrendingClips.ts: Query hook that fetches trending clips from the backend actor when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useYouTubeChannel.ts: Manages YouTube channel connection status and OAuth flow with query and mutation hooks, currently using mock OAuth data with extensive debug logging.
Utility hook providing functions to validate YouTube URLs and extract video IDs using regex patterns.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, including color variables for UI components (primary, secondary, accent, destructive, etc.) and chart colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support for maintaining state across navigation.
frontend/src/utils/youtubeOAuthDebug.ts: Debugging utility class for tracking YouTube OAuth flow with structured logging, validation of OAuth responses, and common error pattern detection with helpful suggestions.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom colors using OKLCH color space, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking document for a YouTube video clipping application, listing architectural notes about authentication changes, known issues (admin panel, user isolation, YouTube connection), and completed features including clip management and AI suggestions.
